positive: A stylized, highly detailed celestial botanical silhouette: a majestic crescent moon intertwining with stylized floral elements (cosmos flowers, nebula leaves) and delicate constellations. The composition must be central and symmetrical, featuring clean, solid linework with strong contrast between the elements and the background. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, shimmering gold, and muted sage green. The style should mimic sophisticated graphic illustration, vector art, and etching techniques, emphasizing clean edges and bold silhouettes for apparel printing. Full view, isolated subject, perfect symmetry, high resolution, printable digital artwork.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, busy background, photorealism, gradient, solid block colors, messy, writing, poor contrast
